news.title: Nvidia CEO brands Taiwan 'epicentre' of AI revolution
news.description: Nvidia's chief executive has said the chip company plans to invest around $150 billion a year in Taiwan, terming it the "epicentre" of the AI revolution and predicting it will be the world's tech manufacturing hub for a long time.

news.title: I tried using ChatGPT to recreate my 1990s childhood for my kid — and suddenly our weekend had no screens at all
news.description: Chalk, bubbles and blanket forts turned our AI-planned weekend into pure nostalgia

news.title: Anthropic co-founder hallucinates ghost in the machine after hearing the Pope speak about AI
news.description: The nature of AI is unnatural. It's not intelligent. It's not human

news.title: I asked ChatGPT to compare Thailand, Vietnam and Bali for a ₹2 lakh vegetarian trip from Delhi. Here’s the AI verdict
news.description: Could ₹2 lakh really buy a comfortable, and stress-free international holiday for a vegetarian Indian couple in 2026? ChatGPT compared Thailand, Vietnam, Bali, Malaysia and Sri Lanka — factoring in flights, Airbnbs, café culture, shopping, vegetarian food and…

news.title: OpenAI is building a new kind of ad machine. Early data suggests Google should worry.
news.description: How ChatGPT ads turn conversations into buying intent, and why OpenAI may have a massive new revenue engine

news.title: (g+) Artificial Intelligence: China overhauls world's biggest surveillance network with advanced AI
news.description: Local police forces are modernising the country's ageing infrastructure with more powerful tracking systems (KI, Datenschutz)
